channel.title: CloudSpark CRM
channel.description: CloudSpark CRM helps RevOps leaders collapse spreadsheets, email threads, and call notes into one clear timeline so teams respond faster. The platform includes AI nudges, territory mapping, and ready-to-send playbooks…

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: presspilot
item.content:encoded:
Built with PressPilot Golden Foundation

CloudSpark CRM

CloudSpark CRM helps RevOps leaders collapse spreadsheets, email threads, and call notes into one clear timeline so teams respond faster. The platform includes AI nudges, territory mapping, and ready-to-send playbooks…

Get started
See live demo

Everything you need to ship faster

🚀 Fast builds

Generate complete landing pages and patterns in minutes, not weeks.

🎨 Flexible styles

Swap between curated palettes and typography without touching code.

🌍 Multilingual-ready

Serve global audiences with RTL-aware content and layouts.

🔐 Production ready

Clean block markup, solid theme tokens, and exportable static builds.

Plans for every service

CloudSpark CRM can switch tiers any time—kits stay in sync automatically.

Starter

$19 / month

  • 1 brand setup
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
Choose Starter

Growth

$49 / month

  • Unlimited kits
  • Mode-aware add-ons
  • Priority support
Choose Growth

Pro

$99 / month

  • Dedicated strategist
  • Custom exports
  • Training & SLA
Choose Pro

Latest updates

Use this space to share product launches, playbooks, or insights.

Playbook

CloudSpark CRM release notes

Share a concise summary of your latest platform update or feature drop.

Case study

How teams ship faster

Highlight a customer win, metric, or testimonial from recent work.

Announcement

What’s next for CloudSpark CRM

Tease upcoming launches, events, or community projects to keep people excited.

Ready to work with CloudSpark CRM?

Tell us about your product and we’ll help you ship a polished marketing site. Reach us at hello@cloudspark-crm.com.

  • Email: hello@cloudspark-crm.com

Book a call

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: presspilot
item.content:encoded:
About CloudSpark CRM

🚀 Fast builds

Generate complete landing pages and patterns in minutes, not weeks.

🎨 Flexible styles

Swap between curated palettes and typography without touching code.

🌍 Multilingual-ready

Serve global audiences with RTL-aware content and layouts.

🔐 Production ready

Clean block markup, solid theme tokens, and exportable static builds.

item.title: Pricing
item.dc:creator: presspilot
item.content:encoded:
Plans for every service

CloudSpark CRM can switch tiers any time—kits stay in sync automatically.

Starter

$19 / month

  • 1 brand setup
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
Choose Starter

Growth

$49 / month

  • Unlimited kits
  • Mode-aware add-ons
  • Priority support
Choose Growth

Pro

$99 / month

  • Dedicated strategist
  • Custom exports
  • Training & SLA
Choose Pro

Tell us about your product and we’ll help you ship a polished marketing site. Reach us at hello@cloudspark-crm.com.
